title: (Bullish Signal) URI, MACD Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling URI's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron A.I. dvisor identified 41 similar cases where URI's MACD histogram became positive, and 32 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 78%. Current price $191.93 is above $189.40 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 10/06/20 - 11/05/20, the price experienced a -3% Downtrend, while the week of 10/29/20 - 11/05/20 shows a +9% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/ukejb0r08ox51.png?width=1446&format=png&auto=webp&s=57b82ff1047ebe13662469e4c1943147744983fd

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on November 05, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on URI as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in  62 of 76 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for URI just turned positive on November 05, 2020. Looking at past instances where URI's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise in 32 of 41 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 78%.

URI moved above its 50-day Moving Average on November 05, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for URI crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on October 05, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 12 of 16 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 75%.

Following a +12.99% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where URI advanced for three days, in 263 of 348 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 76%.
